subcodes.first_line: O Wronged One! Make mention of him who hath turned towards the horizon of divine knowledge, through Thy grace. Verily, Thou art the All-Bountiful, the Most Generous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مظلوم ان اذکر من اقبل الی افق العرفان فضلا من عندک انک انت الفضال الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
